detail: Cloudflare-style regex rule was enabled in the edge request path.
The request filter began evaluating the pathological regex under live traffic.
The first synthetic request exceeded the user-visible timeout budget.
The AIOps detector raised a critical latency alert after the regex CPU spike.
The pipeline published RCA pointing to the edge regex service.
The primary on-call acknowledged the page and started mitigation.
The request filter was confirmed as the CPU amplification source.
The faulty WAF rule was disabled to stop catastrophic backtracking.
Latency returned to baseline immediately after the rule rollback.
